backend/main.mo: Primary canister actor defining all gym domain types, storage maps, and authorization/storage mixins for members, packages, attendance, videos, and pause requests.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module converting older actor state to the new format, mainly upgrading pause request status types and producing a new actor state object.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented UI features to source files, components, and test IDs with high-confidence metadata.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries of multiple frontend files describing their purpose across authentication, dashboards, hooks, dialogs, and utilities.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS configuration defining theme tokens and light/dark color variables for the app UI.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point that mounts the React app and sets the RawFit Gym page title.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main application controller handling admin/member authentication, health checks, error boundaries, and routing to dashboards.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: UI screen shown when an authenticated user lacks permissions, with logout functionality and basic messaging.
frontend/src/components/admin/Attendance: Admin UI for searching members, viewing attendance history, and recording manual check-ins and check-outs.
frontend/src/components/admin/DashboardT: Admin dashboard showing system stats, notifications, and quick-start guidance.
frontend/src/components/admin/DietFormDi: Dialog for creating or editing diet charts with meal editing support and form submission.
frontend/src/components/admin/DietsTab.t: Admin interface for listing, searching, creating, and editing diet charts.
frontend/src/components/admin/GymQRCodeG: Displays and auto-refreshes a gym attendance QR code, with download and manual refresh options.
frontend/src/components/admin/MemberForm: Dialog for creating or editing member profiles with package, dates, discount handling, and async data loading.
frontend/src/components/admin/MembersTab: Lists, filters, and manages member profiles with status badges and access to the member form dialog.
frontend/src/components/admin/PackageFor: Dialog for creating or editing membership packages with form validation and price preview.
frontend/src/components/admin/PackagesTa: Displays, filters, edits, and deletes membership packages with dialogs for creation and confirmation.
frontend/src/components/admin/PauseReque: Displays pending pause requests with approve/deny dialogs and member lookup helpers.
Shows a full admin table of all pause requests with status badges and approve/deny actions.
frontend/src/components/admin/TestDataDi: Empty placeholder file with no implemented content.
frontend/src/components/admin/VideoLibra: Lists searchable workout videos and opens an upload dialog or video details on click.
frontend/src/components/admin/VideoUploa: Handles uploading new workout videos with metadata, progress tracking, and form inputs.
frontend/src/components/admin/WorkoutFor: Creates or edits workout charts with form fields and dynamic exercise management.
frontend/src/components/admin/WorkoutsTa: Displays workout charts with search, loading skeletons, and create/edit dialog handling.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.ts: React error boundary that catches render errors and shows a fallback UI with reset or reload capability.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Header displaying gym branding and a user menu with profile info and logout functionality.
frontend/src/components/member/MemberDas: Member dashboard showing profile, diet, workout, attendance, membership status, and pause/resume actions.
frontend/src/components/member/MemberHea: Header bar showing gym logo and member dropdown with profile info and logout.
frontend/src/components/member/MemberMem: Card displaying membership status and pause request messages based on profile and request state.
frontend/src/components/member/MemberVid: Video library gated by location verification, showing videos only when within gym radius.
frontend/src/components/member/QRAttenda: QR attendance component verifying location and scanning QR codes to record check-ins.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal prompting users to enter and save name and email before continuing.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor tied to the user's identity, refetching and invalidating queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication state, login/logout handling, and identity persistence via a React context.
frontend/src/hooks/useMemberAuth.ts: Manages member ID authentication using localStorage and exposes login/logout helpers tied to backend validation.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for backend health checks, user profiles, roles, members, and mutations using the actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Sets up Tailwind base styles and defines light/dark CSS variables for UI theming.
frontend/src/lib/currencyUtils.ts: Utility functions for formatting numbers as INR, converting monthly amounts, and coercing values into INR format.
frontend/src/lib/locationUtils.ts: Provides geolocation utilities including distance calculation, current location retrieval, and gym-range verification.
frontend/src/lib/qrCodeUtils.ts: Utility functions for generating, parsing, and validating QR code data including checksums and timestamps.
frontend/src/main.tsx: App entry point initializing React, query client, and Internet Identity provider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page with tab-based navigation for managing gym data and features.
frontend/src/pages/AdminLoginPage.tsx: Admin login page handling Internet Identity authentication with retry and loading states.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Empty or placeholder login page file.
frontend/src/pages/LoginSelectionPage.ts: Login selection screen allowing users to choose between admin and member login flows.
frontend/src/pages/MemberDashboard.tsx: Member dashboard with tabs for personal dashboard and video library.
frontend/src/pages/MemberLoginPage.tsx: Member login page supporting membership ID login, error handling, and backend health checks.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides helpers to read URL parameters (including hash-based), persist them in sessionStorage, and clear them from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind with custom colors, animations, container settings, and typography/container-queries/animate plugins.
project_state.json: Describes the project's state, architecture, known issues, and existing features for the RawFit Gym full‑stack application.
